final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a sunny park scene viewed from slightly below and in front of the main subjects. The central foreground features a man standing next to a golden retriever seated on the ground. The man is wearing a light blue button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. His curly hair is visible, and he is smiling at the camera. To his right (viewer's left), a large tree trunk rises vertically, its branches extending overhead. The ground beneath them is covered in fresh white snow, with subtle footprints visible around their feet. Soft shadows of the man, dog, and tree are cast onto the snow, appearing slightly diffused and aligned with the bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right. In the background, two wooden park benches are placed symmetrically — one on the left side of the frame and one on the right. Beyond the benches, a wide expanse of green grass stretches toward a distant body of water, with a faint outline of a cityscape on the horizon. The sky above is a clear, bright blue with a few wispy clouds. The lighting is natural daylight, creating a cool, crisp atmosphere typical of a snowy day. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing the subject directly; Spatial layout: The man and dog are centered in the foreground. A tree trunk is visible to the left of the man. Two park benches are in the background, one on the left and one on the right. reasoning_chain: Step 1: The image shows a sunny park scene with green grass, a man, and a dog. The ground is currently dry and covered in grass.
Step 2: The hypothetical instruction asks to imagine the ground covered in snow while people are present.

Step 3: Snow would cover the grass, making it white and likely compacted underfoot. The man and dog would be standing or sitting on the snow-covered ground. Shadows from the trees and people would still be visible but altered by the new surface texture.
instruction: 如果公园里人很多，地面被雪覆盖会怎样？
visual_cues: Camera viewpoint: eye-level shot, facing the subject directly.

Spatial layout: The man and dog are centered in the foreground. A tree trunk is visible to the left of the man. Two park benches are in the background, one on the left and one on the right. The grassy area extends to the horizon where a body of water and distant cityscape are visible.
Dominant color palette: Bright greens from the grass, light blue from the sky, and warm tones from the man's clothing and the dog's fur.
Lighting quality and direction: Bright daylight coming from above and slightly to the right, casting soft shadows to the left of the man and dog.
Surface materials and textures: Green grass with short blades; smooth skin and fabric textures on the man and dog; wooden texture on the park benches.
Overall atmosphere: Sunny, open, and serene outdoor park setting.
physics_implications: The grass will be replaced by a layer of white snow, altering the ground texture and color.
Footprints or disturbances in the snow may appear where the man and dog are standing or sitting.
Shadows cast by the man, dog, and tree will still be present but may appear softer or less defined due to the snow's reflective surface.
The overall brightness of the scene may decrease slightly due to the increased reflectivity of the snow compared to the dark grass.
preserve_objects: spatial layout (relative positions of all objects)

Is the man wearing a light blue shirt and khaki pants?
Are the shadows of the man, dog, and tree visible on the snow?
